series_metadata.series_description: These are files on, for example, the Ohio Beef Council. The file includes information on the directors of the Ohio Beef Council, financial statements, promotional material the council sends to the Markets division, and the council''s policies and procedures manual. Other commodity groups Markets oversees are the Apple Marketing program, Ohio Vegetable & Small Fruit Research and Development, the Ohio Corn Marketing Program, and the Ohio Egg Marketing Program.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Review files every and dispose of documents in them that are no longer needed
